chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 7402 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.32501/2021 2. For hearing of main case 16.04.2025 Mr. Muzamil Soomro, advocate for the petitioner Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate` for respondent along with Mr. Naveed Ellahi, Collector of Customs Appraisement East Statement filed on behalf of respondents No.2 & 3, taken on record. Mr. Naveed Ellahi, Collector of Customs Appraisement East, is present pursuant to the court order and reiterates the operative part of the statement that the answering respondent shall do the final assessment under Section 25 uninfluenced by the Assessment Alert subject matter herein. In view hereof learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petition has served its purpose and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. The presence and assistance of the learned Commissioner is appreciated. Judge Judge Amjad
